news.title: Trump orders Navy to 'shoot and kill any boat' laying mines in Hormuz Strait
news.summary: The U.S. is ratcheting up tensions with Iran over the strait. The strait has been largely choked off to oil tanker traffic since the war began.

news.title: Trump administration moves to reclassify cannabis in major shift that could expand research
news.summary: Trump administration to reclassify marijuana as Schedule III, easing research barriers but not legalizing the drug or changing current federal penalties. Trump administration toReclassifymarijuana.com.

news.title: Trump's net approval rating on economy and overall falls to lowest of his two terms, CNBC survey shows
news.summary: President Donald Trump's approval ratings plunged in the latest CNBC All-America Economic Survey. Trump's overall — and economic — approval ratings dropped in the survey.

news.title: Warner Bros. Discovery shareholders approve Paramount acquisition
news.summary: Warner Bros. Discovery shareholders held a special meeting on Thursday for shareholders to vote on Paramount's proposed acquisition of the company. Paramount has offered to buy out Warner Bros. for $4 billion.

news.title: American Airlines cuts 2026 earnings projections after surge in jet fuel
news.summary: American Airlines cut its 2026 earnings forecast. It is the latest airline to lower its outlook after a surge in fuel costs added billions to its expenses.

news.title: U.S. inflation picture is the worst in almost 4 years
news.summary: S&P Global surveys show that companies are willing to pay more for scarce supplies. The survey is an echo of the pandemic.

news.title: I’m 56. My home has $400,000 in equity. If I lose my job, should I do a reverse mortgage?
news.summary: “I currently make $145,000, and my wife makes $98,000.” he said. “I’m very happy. I’ve never been happier.’

news.title: Hainan was China’s shopping paradise. For Beijing that’s no longer enough.
news.summary: Beijing's message is unmistakable: Hainan can no longer thrive merely as a place for domestic shoppers to buy their perfume and handbags. It will have to become a place to process goods, attract overseas capital and experiment with a more open economic model.

news.title: Texas Instruments topped Wall Street’s outlook on more than just data-center demand
news.summary: Texas Instruments, one of the microchip makers most exposed to the manufacturing sector, raised its outlook. The company saw strong demand from industrial customers as well as from the build-out of data centers.

news.title: Why ServiceNow’s stock is sliding in the wake of earnings
news.summary: Investors may be taking issue with various elements of the software company’s margin forecast. The software company's margin forecast has been questioned by some investors.
